1. Loads an image using `cv2.imread`.
2. Converts the image to the HSV (Hue, Saturation, Value) color space using `cv2.cvtColor` and names the resulting HSV image `img_hsv`.
3. Extracts the HSV channels and specifies the threshold intervals for each channel for calculating histcounts (`numpy.where`).
